title: Filipino Lumpia (Vegetable Spring Rolls)
description: A classic Filipino dish, Lumpia is a delicious vegetable spring roll that is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside. Serve as a snack or side dish.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, carrots, and zucchini.
If using shrimp, add to the bowl and mix well.
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour and water to form a dough.
Wrap the dough around the vegetable mixture, forming a tight cylinder.
Fry the lumpia in the hot oil until golden brown and crispy.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
